bird.name: Pacific kingfisher
bird.summary: The Pacific kingfisher (Todiramphus sacer) is a medium-sized kingfisher belonging to the subfamily Halcyoninae, the tree kingfishers. It ha…

relations.subject: Pacific kingfisher
relations.evidence: It is most commonly found in coastal areas, particularly in mangrove swamps
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Pacific kingfisher
relations.evidence: It also inhabits farmland, open woodland, grassland and gardens
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
